seoTitle: Glen Allen vs Glen Davis — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Glen Allen and Glen Davis. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Glen Allen vs Glen Davis: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Glen Allen and Glen Davis.
heading: Glen Allen vs Glen Davis — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Glen Allen, New South Wales and Glen Davis, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Glen Davis has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Glen Allen (48/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Glen Allen or Glen Davis safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Glen Allen has a flood risk score of 60/100, while Glen Davis scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Glen Allen scores 60/100 for bushfire risk. Glen Davis scores 32/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Glen Allen or Glen Davis?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Glen Davis has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.63% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
